content: Piper: Piper Wright here. I just heard about a new group of raiders moving into Diamond City. They've been causing quite the ruckus out in the fringes. What's Diamond City Security doing about them? Diamond City Security: Diamond City Security is aware of the situation. Our teams are monitoring the area and we are on high alert. We appreciate any information you can provide us, Miss Wright. Your insights are invaluable to us. Piper: Oh, I'll keep you guys updated. I don't want this city to fall into the hands of another gang. It's already too dangerous out there. Aster: Good evening, Piper. How's your search for the missing detective going? Piper: Slow progress, but we're making headway. I've got a lead that could take us to the island. Do you know anything about it? Aster: The island? I'm not familiar with any investigation there.

Piper: Well, if you hear anything, let me know. I'll need all the help I can get. Aster: Of course, Piper. Good luck on your mission. I hope you find the missing detective soon. Piper: Me too. Thanks for your help. Let's catch up soon. Aster: Sounds great. Take care, Piper. Piper: You too, Aster.
